summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: arc length of logarithmic spiral (e^(0.2t) cos t, e^(0.2t) sin t) on [0, 4π]. NumberPlane with GREY faint full spiral + YELLOW always_redraw partial trace + ORANGE head dot as ValueTracker t_tr sweeps. Live L via np.trapezoid matches analytic √(1+a²)/a·(e^(at)-1) to ~4 decimals.
